audit_items.proof_trace: `isAssetOutPriceValid` is initialized `false` and only set `true` when the loop processes `asset == s_assetOut` and `_getAssetPrice` returns `isValid = true` (non-zero, non-stale); after the loop lines 271-273 enforce `eligibleAssetsIdx = 0` if the flag is not set. A second independent guard exists in `performUpkeep` (L314-316): if `eligibleAssets.length > 0`, it calls `_getAssetPrice(assetOut, true)` with `withValidation=true` which reverts on stale or zero price, preventing any auction starts even if `checkUpkeep` is bypassed.
